violations.text: Establishment does not have an individual with the Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license. Application provided during time of inspection. Establishment has individuals with active food safety certificates. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

-Collanders, rags and dish washing aids were observed in the hand-washing sinks. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine must be cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Ice was voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishmachine. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2025
Openings observed in floor in basement. The physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2026
